claim_boundary: Eligibility screening occurred before target-family DSV4 generation. Inclusion reflects executable simulator suitability, not model success.

rows.reason: Public protocol documentation, state-changing stochastic volume simulator, reproducible reset after dual-RNG seeding, independent volume and repeatability checks. External-only because the upstream repository has no declared license.
Public potentiostat interface and finite-difference CV simulator with independently checked waveform, acquisition, response, limits, and cleanup.
Public simulator based on measured RGB spectra and documented detector integration and gain behavior, with independent range, frame, dark, and cleanup checks.
Pinned AMD64 simulator image could not be pulled after three attempts because Docker Desktop's macOS credential helper failed before registry contact. No execution or model evidence was produced.
Isaac Sim GPU runtime was not qualified on the available ARM systems and Matterix already influenced development architecture.
Executable simulator exists, but OT-2 and liquid-transfer behavior already appear in Proprio development evidence.
Example plate reader and robot modules are explicitly fake/test implementations and do not provide the required physical measurement model.

rows.candidate: CADET paired with AC Agilent HPLC-MS sources
rows.reason: Strong chromatography physics and public instrument sources, but requires a new translation adapter; retained as the first reserve family rather than delaying this CPU panel.
